'''gachowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatroculture|iatroculture]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatroculture|iatroculture]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gachowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæcheweth|gæcheweth]] || [[word:gæchewej|gæchewej]] || [[word:gæchewesh|gæchewesh]] || [[word:gæchewe|gæchewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gachochowoth|gachochowoth]] || [[word:gachochowoj|gachochowoj]] || [[word:gachochowosh|gachochowosh]] || [[word:gachochowo|gachochowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gachowoth|gachowoth]] || [[word:gachowoj|gachowoj]] || [[word:gachowosh|gachowosh]] || [[word:gachowo|gachowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gachofwofth|gachofwofth]] || [[word:gachofwofj|gachofwofj]] || [[word:gachofwofsh|gachofwofsh]] || [[word:gachofwof|gachofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gachowotho|gachowotho]] || [[word:gachowojo|gachowojo]] || [[word:gachowosho|gachowosho]] || [[word:gachowoko|gachowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gachowoth|gachowoth]] || [[word:gachowoj|gachowoj]] || [[word:gachowosh|gachowosh]] || [[word:gachowo|gachowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gachowothol|gachowothol]] || [[word:gachowojol|gachowojol]] || [[word:gachowoshol|gachowoshol]] || [[word:gachowokol|gachowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gachowoothotho|gachowoothotho]] || [[word:gachowoojojo|gachowoojojo]] || [[word:gachowooshosho|gachowooshosho]] || [[word:gachowooko|gachowooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gachowothon|gachowothon]] || [[word:gachowojon|gachowojon]] || [[word:gachowoshon|gachowoshon]] || [[word:gachowokon|gachowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gachowothooro|gachowothooro]] || [[word:gachowojooro|gachowojooro]] || [[word:gachowoshooro|gachowoshooro]] || [[word:gachowokooro|gachowokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
